zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Radcliffe於1245年出生在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，他的父親Robert de Radcliffe35歲，母親Amabil de Trafford25歲。他於1267年與Margaret le Boteler在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年在英國藍卡爾波利享年81歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Radcliffe于1245年出生在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，他的父亲Robert de Radcliffe35岁，母亲Amabil de Trafford25岁。他于1267年与Margaret le Boteler在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年在英国藍卡爾波利享年81岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Radcliffe was born in 1245, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert de Radcliffe, was 35 and his mother, Amabil de Trafford, was 25. He married Margaret le Boteler in 1267, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1326, in Bury, Lancashire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Radcliffe est né en 1245, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Radcliffe, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Amabil de Trafford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret le Boteler en 1267, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1326, à Bury, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Radcliffe 1245 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Radcliffe 35 und seine Mutter Amabil de Trafford 25. Er hat 1267 in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1326 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Bury, Lancashire, England und wurde in Manchester, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Radcliffe è nato il nel 1245 nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Radcliffe, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Amabil de Trafford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret le Boteler nel 1267, nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1326, nel Bury, Lancashire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Manchester, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffeが1245年にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで生まれた時，父Robert de Radcliffeは35歳，母Amabil de Traffordは25歳であった。1267年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでMargaret le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年にイギリスランカシュアイアブリーで81歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe(이)가 1245년 영국 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Radcliffe(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabil de Trafford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1267년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 Margaret le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 영국 랭카실르 버이에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

mn.Bewsey Hall, Warrington, Lancashire, Eng: Warrington, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Radcliffe nasceu em 1245, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Radcliffe, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Amabil de Trafford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret le Boteler em 1267, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1326, em Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Radcliffe родился в 1245 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Radcliffe было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabil de Trafford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret le Boteler в 1267 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1326 г. в местности бури, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Radcliffe nació en 1245, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Radcliffe, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Amabil de Trafford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret le Boteler en 1267, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1326, en Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
